Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional long-term performers dominating the ranking. AGX holds the #1 position with a remarkable 1,872.58% ten-year return and an exceptional 94.6 composite score, driven by consistent acceleration across timeframes (11.19% in 1m to 262.62% in 1y). LINC follows with an even more extreme 2,489.01% ten-year return despite a weaker one-year showing (133.14%), suggesting a secular trend that accelerated significantly in the past decade but has moderated recently. Both securities pass all four ratio tests and trade above all major moving averages, indicating sustained uptrends, though AGX shows stronger recent momentum and more balanced outperformance against SPY/QQQ/IAU benchmarks. The thin volatility flag on AGX and the incomplete data for LINC suggest these are specialized or lower-liquidity securities rather than broad-market performers. These extreme multi-year returns likely reflect specific sector tailwinds rather than typical equity market dynamics.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
